summary: Critical gaps: workflow references missing files (PrLabelAssigner.Tests.ps1, fixtures/*.json, .actrc, labels.config.json) that don't exist in deliverable—workflow cannot run. Action `actions/checkout@v4` not pinned to SHA (violates pinning best practice). PowerShell uses `Set-StrictMode` and error handling correctly, but glob-to-regex conversion (ConvertTo-RegexFromGlob) uses character-by-character index parsing without comments explaining the ** vs * distinction—fragile and hard to maintain. Parameter validation sparse (no ValidateNotNullOrEmpty on key params). Run-ActTests.ps1 has repetitive JSON normalization logic (lines ~80-90) that could be factored. Fixture resolution in workflow (FIXTURE vs INPUT_FIXTURE) is convoluted. Would not execute locally with `act` due to missing files.
